name: Grub
description: A docile underground creature found in many soft-soil areas of the park. It remains important for its early materials and for how naturally it teaches the player to read the ground by sound.
behavior: It stays underground almost all the time and only surfaces while moving or when forced out. Its trail matters more than its silhouette; most of the time you hear it and track it long before you ever see it.
interactionWithPlayer: It does not seek combat. Most of the time the player is the one hunting it for materials, so the real challenge is not surviving but intercepting it before it disappears underground again.
interactionWithCreatures: Its main defense is staying buried and away from visible threats. Rather than taking part in the ecosystem's active fights, it usually exists just below them.
strategy: Listen for its underground movement, cut off the route, and force it out before it dives again. If you miss the first try, reposition quickly instead of blindly chasing the last trail you saw.
